summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of O Level Quiz app. All 11 backend pytest tests passed. All critical frontend flows verified (home loads, 4 subject cards + mock banner, navigation to /quiz/{code}, timer counting from 20:00, option selection highlights, Next/Prev/Jump nav, submit -> confirm modal -> results page with score, filters and review items, MOCK route loads 50 questions, INVALID code shows error UI).

issues: Question card text + option text appear in low-contrast greyish tone in screenshot (font-weight/colour rendering); verify on actual viewport but readability seems OK on real DOM

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') - prefer lifespan handler
questions.py question pool is small; random.sample with min(num,len) silently returns less than expected count if pool < num - acceptable but worth a log
No rate-limiting / session expiry on quiz_sessions collection (sessions persist forever) - consider TTL index
Frontend Quiz.jsx timer effect uses setTimeout chained with state update - works but slight drift over long sessions; acceptable for 20-60 min
seed_data_creation: None - questions are static in questions.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_quiz_api.py covers subjects, mock-info, start-quiz (M1-M4, MOCK, lowercase, INVALID), submit (valid + invalid session). Frontend uses data-testid attributes: home-page, subject-card-{M1..M4}, mock-test-banner, mock-test-start-btn, hero-start-mock-btn, quiz-page, quiz-timer, quiz-progress, quiz-option-{0..n}, quiz-next-btn, quiz-prev-btn, quiz-jump-{i}, quiz-submit-btn, quiz-confirm-modal, quiz-confirm-submit, quiz-error, results-page, results-score, filter-{all|correct|wrong|skipped}, review-item-{i}.
